newsapi.title: OpenAI exec Fidji Simo says she will step down and transition to part-time advisor - CNBC
newsapi.description: Fidji Simo stepped away from OpenAI in April for a medical leave, says she now has to focus on recovery.
newsapi.content: Fidji Simo, OpenAI's product and business chief, on Thursday announced she is stepping down from her role at the artificial intelligence company to focus on recovery after a "severe exacerbation of a… [+2017 chars]

bbc.title: Wildfire in southern Spain leaves at least 12 dead and 23 missing
bbc.description: A local official said four of the victims may be British after a fire broke out near Los Gallardos, Almería.

bbc.title: Meet the crypto billionaires building a world where money buys you a vote
bbc.description: They think democracy has run its course - so they're setting up their own nations instead.

bbc.title: East Asia braces for destructive typhoon as landslides kill 15 in Philippines
bbc.description: Heading for Taiwan and south-eastern China, the 1,000 km-wide Bavi is forecast to be one of the strongest storms in decades.

bbc.title: Forced to wait his turn, Marine Le Pen's deputy Bardella returns to the shadows
bbc.description: Thirty-year-old Jordan Bardella had been groomed for success as France's next hard-right leader. He will now have to wait longer.

bbc.title: Zulu king expresses regret after video captures tirade against his wife
bbc.description: In the footage widely shared in South Africa, King Misuzulu threatens to physically assault his wife and accuses her of cheating.

bbc.title: Man fatally shot by ICE in Houston was not intended target, DHS says
bbc.description: Immigration agents were looking for a different person when they shot Lorenzo Salgado Araujo during a traffic stop, officials say.

bbc.title: Man nearly sucked out of window mid-air on Ryanair plane, passengers say
bbc.description: The man's wife held onto his legs for around five minutes to stop him from being sucked out, officials say.

bbc.title: New dinosaur species with neck as long as cricket pitch discovered in Thailand
bbc.description: The plant-eating dinosaur, named Uragasaurus kalasinensis, is thought to have lived about 150 million years ago.

bbc.title: Major car firms found not to have installed emissions-cheating devices
bbc.description: A High Court judge said some major car manufacturers did not install a device to cheat emissions testing.

bbc.title: EasyJet agrees to surprise takeover bid as rival US firm swoops in
bbc.description: The airline says a bid from US firm Apollo has trumped a recent takeover offer from Castlelake.

bbc.title: 'Cool in 90 seconds' - the fake portable air conditioners sweeping the internet
bbc.description: The ASA says adverts claiming small devices can rapidly cool rooms were too good to be true.

bbc.title: Man nearly sucked out of window mid-air on Ryanair plane, passengers say
bbc.description: The man's wife held onto his legs for around five minutes to stop him from being sucked out, officials say.

bbc.title: Vapes to have less enticing names and flavours to protect children
bbc.description: People are being consulted about plans to stop vape companies using enticing flavour descriptions that "attract" children into experimenting.

bbc.title: Pressure builds on Europe's biggest port to be greener
bbc.description: A lawsuit demands that the Port of Rotterdam moves faster to cut its dependence on fossil fuel firms.

bbc.title: We've saved £6,000 on holidays by swapping homes with strangers
bbc.description: The BBC looks at the growing trend of people swapping homes to cut holiday costs.

bbc.title: Chip giant SK Hynix raises $26.5bn as shares surge in bumper US listing
bbc.description: The shares surged as much as 17% in their Nasdaq trading debut on Friday following the record-breaking foreign listing.
